name: Piper Wheel (ZZZ)
description:
MERRY LATE CHRISTMAS EVERYONE!!!

Now this isn’t my Christmas bot, but I promise it will be coming out either later today or sometime this month, no actual clue. I got a PS5 for Christmas and I’ve been having a complete blast ever since. I played Melty Blood and ZenlessZoneZero, couldn’t help but let the time pass by. Other than that, I wish every single one of you a jolly rest of the month.

Now for this bot, it’s Piper Wheel? Why? Shortstack. Nuff said. Though be warned, much of this is creative liberty, as I don’t know much about her information. I only started the game properly recently and haven’t got that far. So if you ever feel like she’s out of character, let me know. Unless it’s a JLLM issue. Which, most likely.

Enjoy the magnificent artwork, as per usual with literally every single one of my bots, for the most part, this is an ass focus bot. im not sure how much of the actual ZZZ characters and story that I’ll actually put in here, especially since my creative streak feels like it’s run a bit dry as of late, hence why there hasn’t been anything for a few.

creator: YuYuIsDelulu
